overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a dimly lit underground market corridor with vibrant neon lighting. The player walks past vending machines and arcade cabinets, discovers a deceased NPC slumped against a machine, loots a container in a dark construction area, and ascends a concrete stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underground market corridor with arcade machines

events.description: discovers deceased individual slumped against vending machine on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor examining vending machines and arcade cabinets

notable_agents.action: deceased individual lying against the vending machine

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with various products
retro-style arcade game machines with glowing screens
red neon sign indicating open businesses
orange plastic bench seating along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow underground corridor lined with glowing vending machines on the left and arcade cabinets on the right. Neon signs illuminate the path ahead. Around 8 seconds, a deceased individual comes into view, slumped against one of the vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor section with red neon arch lighting and seating

events.description: passes the deceased individual and continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking past the body and continuing through the red-lit section of the corridor

entered.detail: structural archway illuminated with red neon lighting
construction barriers with yellow and black hazard stripes
construction barriers with red and white stripes

segments.scene_description: Moving past the deceased individual, the player enters a section with prominent red neon lighting on the right wall. Orange seating lines the corridor, and construction barriers become visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark construction zone with metal grate flooring

events.description: opens loot container and takes hardened leather work boots

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark construction area and looting a container near the barriers

entered.detail: open equipment case with glowing contents
metal grate flooring in the construction zone

segments.scene_description: The player enters a darker construction zone with metal grate flooring and hazard barriers. At 35 seconds, the player interacts with a loot container, retrieving items while the UI overlay appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path through the main corridor

events.description: turns around and begins walking back toward the main corridor

agents.ego_description: turning back and returning through the corridor toward the stairwell

entered.detail: orange bench seating coming back into view
vending machines visible again on the left
arcade machines on the right side
entrance to concrete stairwell at corridor end

segments.scene_description: After looting, the player turns around and walks back through the corridor. The vending machines and arcade cabinets come back into view, and a stairwell entrance becomes visible at the far end of the passage.

events.description: enters stairwell and begins ascending the concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the stairwell at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading upward with metal railings
bare concrete walls of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the stairwell entrance and transitions into a darker concrete staircase. The camera ascends the stairs, leaving the market corridor behind as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit underground market that transitions into a gritty construction zone before ascending toward an exit. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor lined with glowing vending machines and arcade cabinets, passing a deceased individual slumped against the wall. As the camera advances, the lighting shifts to a prominent red glow alongside orange seating, leading directly into a darker construction area characterized by metal grate flooring and hazard barriers. After pausing to loot a container, the camera turns back through the vibrant corridor before shifting focus toward a distant stairwell entrance. The scene finally transitions into a dim concrete staircase as the camera ascends, leaving the illuminated market behind.
